sentences.text: The app uses a smart ___ to suggest personalised content to each user.
sentences.hint: A set of rules or steps followed by a computer to solve a problem

sentences.text: Companies are increasingly using ___ to record transactions securely and transparently.
sentences.hint: A digital system for recording information in a way that is difficult to change

sentences.text: We developed the app on a reliable cloud ___ that supports multiple devices.
sentences.hint: A system or service that other software or services are built on

sentences.text: The new ___ is intuitive and much easier for users to navigate.
sentences.hint: The way a program looks and is arranged on screen for the user

sentences.text: ___ was a major concern when the number of users grew rapidly.
sentences.hint: The ability of a system to handle growing amounts of work

sentences.text: The startup secured a significant ___ from a venture capital fund.
sentences.hint: Money put into a business or project with the expectation of profit

sentences.text: An experienced ___ carefully reviewed the business plan before committing funds.
sentences.hint: A person who puts money into a business hoping to make a profit

sentences.text: The team created a working ___ to demonstrate the core features of the app.
sentences.hint: An early model of a product, built to test the concept

sentences.text: The ___ aims to disrupt the traditional banking sector with its innovative solution.
sentences.hint: A newly established business, especially in technology

sentences.text: The company's ___ mainly comes from premium subscriptions and advertising.
sentences.hint: The total income a business earns from its activities

sentences.text: All user data is stored safely in a secure ___.
sentences.hint: An organised collection of data stored electronically

sentences.text: Strong ___ is necessary to protect sensitive financial information.
sentences.hint: The process of converting information into a secret code

sentences.text: ___ has become a top priority for every fintech company.
sentences.hint: The practice of protecting computer systems from digital attacks

sentences.text: ___ is transforming the way people manage and invest their money.
sentences.hint: Technology used to support or improve banking and financial services

sentences.text: He maintains a diversified ___ that includes stocks, bonds, and startup equity.
sentences.hint: A collection of financial investments held by a person or company

sentences.text: The ___ proved successful after the app gained millions of active users.
sentences.hint: A risky business project or activity undertaken for profit

sentences.text: A positive ___ is essential for retaining customers in competitive markets.
sentences.hint: How a person feels when using a product, system, or service

sentences.text: The team regularly reviews ___ to understand user behaviour and improve the product.
sentences.hint: The systematic analysis of data to find useful patterns

sentences.text: The company invested heavily in modern ___ to handle high traffic.
sentences.hint: The basic systems and equipment needed for something to operate

sentences.text: A smooth ___ process helps new users quickly understand how the app works.
sentences.hint: The process of integrating a new user or employee into a system
